title: Sequelize Basics Quiz
description: Test your basic knowledge of Sequelize ORM for Node.js.

questions.question: What kind of database interface is Sequelize?
Which of these is NOT a supported database for Sequelize?
How do you define a model in Sequelize?
options: Using sequelize.define() or extending the Model class
By creating a JSON file in the config folder
By manually writing a CREATE TABLE statement
By using a generator script in the database console

questions.question: In a development environment, how can you synchronize your models with the database?
What is the recommended approach for managing database schema changes in production instead of synchronization?
